attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  UPLOADED_BY AS BK_SRC_RPTD_UPLD_BY_CEC_ID,
  FILE_NAME AS BK_UPLOAD_FILE_NAME,
  UPLOADED_DTM AS BK_UPLOADED_DTM,
  FILE_NUM_INT AS BK_UPLOAD_FILE_LINE_NUM_INT,
  CAST (UPLOADED_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_UPLOADED_DT,
  COALESCE(RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')  AS RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE_CD,
  COALESCE(BOOK_SOURCE , 'UNKNOWN') AS BOOKINGS_TRX_TYPE_CD,    
  COALESCE(ORDER_LINE_ID,-9999) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_BIGINT,
  COALESCE(SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE , 'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPTD_ORG_SLS_TERR_NAME_CD,
  SPLIT AS ALLOCATION_SPLIT_PCT,
  COALESCE(RESTATED_SALES_TERR_NAME_CODE, 'UNKNOWN')  AS SRC_RPTD_RSTD_SLS_TERR_NAME_CD, 
  COALESCE(SAV_ID,-999) AS SALES_ACCT_ID_BIGINT,
  COALESCE(PARTY_ID,-9999) AS SRC_RPTD_CUST_PRTY_ID_BIGINT,
  COALESCE(DNR_FLAG,'N') AS DO_NOT_RESTATE_FLG,
  COALESCE(EFFECTIVE_DATE, DATE '1900-01-01') AS EFFECTIVE_DT,                
  COALESCE(EXPIRY_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01') AS EXPIRATION_DT,
  APPROVED_BY AS SRC_RPTD_APPROVED_BY_CEC_ID,
  APPROVED_DTM AS APPROVED_DTM,
  CAST (APPROVED_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_APPROVED_DT,
  STATUS AS VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,
  CASE 
	WHEN STATUS = 'SUCCESS' 
		THEN 'VALIDATION SUCCEEDED' 
			ELSE VALIDATION_COMMENTS 
	END AS VALIDATION_STATUS_REASON_DESCR,
  'N' AS PROCESSED_FLG,
  COALESCE(SK_TRX_ID_INT, -999 ) AS SK_TRX_ID_BIGINT,  
  SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_INT AS SK_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID_INT, 
  BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS POS_TRX_ID_BIGINT,
  BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS SLS_ADJSTMT_LINE_NUM,
  SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_BIGINT,  
  COALESCE(ORDER_NUMBER, -9999) AS SRC_RPTD_SLS_ORDER_NUM_BIGINT,
  COALESCE(BK_TOP_POS_TRX_ID_INT,-9999) AS TOP_BOOKINGS_POS_TRX_ID_BIGINT,
  COALESCE(REASON_DESCR,'UNKNOWN') AS REASON_COMMENT_TXT,
  COALESCE(BOOK_SOURCE_SUB_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') AS BOOKINGS_TRX_SUB_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(DERIVED_PARTY_ID, -999) AS SRC_RPTD_ORIGINAL_CUST_PRTY_ID,
COALESCE(DERIVED_SAV_ID, -999) AS ORIGINAL_SALES_ACCT_ID,
COALESCE(ADJUSTMENT_ID, -999) AS DYN_RESTMT_SLS_ADJSTMT_KEY,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
  USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
  USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CASE WHEN RESTATEMENT_SUB_TYPE IN ('RULE1A_NODE_PARTY', /*'RULE1B_NODE_SAV',*/ 'RULE4A_NODE_PARTY', /*'RULE4B_NODE_SAV',*/'RULE1C_NODE_DEAL','RULE4C_NODE_DEAL','EXPIRE_NODE_PARTY','EXPIRE_NODE_DEAL') THEN 'Y'/*commented as part of US286564 changes*/
ELSE 'N'
END SUMMARY_ADJUSTMENT_FLG,
  'Y' AS ACTION_CODE,
  'I' AS DML_TYPE,
RESTATEMENT_TYPE_CODE,
COALESCE(DEAL_ID,'-999') AS BK_DEAL_ID,
NEW_AGENT_NUM
FROM $$STGDB.WI_FIN_ADJ_DRR_NG_3
